modules.source_role: Macro standard-owned option-surface builder that enumerates artifact kinds, cluster-first rows, card drilldowns, Task Ledger organizer routing, Python scope/file navigation, principles, skills, raw-seed shards, frontend surfaces, and runtime-pressure diagnostics without keyword-search-first or payload-body export.
required_anchors: Build standard-owned option surfaces for artifact-kind-first navigation.

modules.source_role: Macro regression suite for the standard option-surface builder, covering cluster-first browsing, stale-source coupling, Task Ledger organizer rows, kernel command redirects, Python file/scope overlays, principles/standards/skills/frontend surfaces, and payload-boundary behavior using public synthetic fixtures.
required_anchors: Regression coverage for standard-owned option-surface navigation.
modules.source_open_payload_boundary: body_in_bundle_source_modules_not_generated_option_surface_outputs_live_task_ledger_mutation_prompt_or_provider_payload_bodies_raw_seed_body_browser_hud_live_access_account_session_state_cookies_recipient_send_state_or_credential_equivalent_material; synthetic tmp_path fixtures remain validation-only inputs

public_runtime_policy: public validation uses exact source digest, anchor checks, syntax compilation, option-surface contract anchors, and payload-boundary assertions; copied source modules are body evidence, while generated option-surface outputs remain runtime projections and not imported product substrate.
receipt_body_policy: receipts report paths hashes counts anchor results and validation checks but never duplicate full source bodies, generated option-surface outputs, Task Ledger live rows beyond public projections, prompt bodies, raw seed bodies, provider request or response payload bodies, account/session material, browser/HUD live access, recipient-send state, or credential-equivalent payloads
source_open_payload_boundary: open_source_everything_but_keys_credentials_account_sessions_cookies_provider_payload_bodies_browser_hud_live_access_raw_seed_bodies_prompt_bodies_recipient_send_state_and_credential_equivalent_material; public synthetic tests are validation-only support around real option-surface machinery
